# Daily Log — 2026-04-10

## Morning Standup

Discussed the component naming convention. Decided to keep snake_case
filenames for consistency with the existing codebase.

## Incident: Build Failure

The CSS framework build broke after updating assets/styles/app.css.
Root cause: forgot to run the build step after the edit.
Fix: added a reminder to the build-rebuild memory file.

## Research

Evaluated framework A vs framework B for a new feature. Framework A
wins on latency and cost. Prototype at src/Service/ExampleLive/ validated.
